name: Kindergarten Ceramics & Sculpture — Semester 1
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for form, texture, pinch and coil exploration with soft materials. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with form, texture, pinch and coil exploration with soft materials.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: form, texture, pinch and coil exploration with soft materials
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about form, texture, pinch and coil exploration with soft materials through a close look at form, texture, pinch and coil exploration with soft materials.

lessons.title: Try it together: form, texture, pinch and coil exploration with soft materials
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about form, texture, pinch and coil exploration with soft materials through a guided practice with form, texture, pinch and coil exploration with soft materials.
